content_body: We celebrated our 5 year anniversary here...sticking to the traditional 5 year gift of wood. We went white water rafting in TN and tubing in GA while here. We had a blast. The staff was very accommodating in letting us drop off our Boston Terrier earlier in the morning before check-in so that we could enjoy a few outdoor activities. Great view, very peaceful.
title: Great View, Very Peaceful
